overexcitement.description: I was excited that the v2 form-A conjunction lever might escape umbrella saturation. The first search killed the optimism — Ledger-State Stigmergy 2604.03997 is the direct conjunction. Logged honestly.

honest_note: First v2-form-A round. Conjunction of stigmergy + ratchet was the test. Ledger-State Stigmergy (2604.03997) is the direct conjunction prior art and CodeCRDT (2510.18893) is the formal-protocol substantive prior art. v2 query rule worked — first query already returned LLM-side substantive prior art (vs epoch 1 R002/R003 where the first queries returned source-domain pages). forced_hit_count = 6, all LLM-side substantive prior art papers, zero source-domain encyclopedic noise. This is the v2 design intent.
